'''âb-ng-y''' ('''kabangay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mooch|mooch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mooch|mooch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabangay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibangay|thibangay]] || [[word:jibangay|jibangay]] || [[word:shibangay|shibangay]] || [[word:kibangay|kibangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubangay|thuthubangay]] || [[word:jujubangay|jujubangay]] || [[word:shushubangay|shushubangay]] || [[word:kukubangay|kukubangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubangay|thubangay]] || [[word:jubangay|jubangay]] || [[word:shubangay|shubangay]] || [[word:kubangay|kubangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubangay|thubangay]] || [[word:jubangay|jubangay]] || [[word:shubangay|shubangay]] || [[word:kubangay|kubangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebangay|thebangay]] || [[word:jebangay|jebangay]] || [[word:shebangay|shebangay]] || [[word:kebangay|kebangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobangay|thothobangay]] || [[word:jojobangay|jojobangay]] || [[word:shoshobangay|shoshobangay]] || [[word:kokobangay|kokobangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangay|thobangay]] || [[word:jobangay|jobangay]] || [[word:shobangay|shobangay]] || [[word:kobangay|kobangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangay|thobangay]] || [[word:jobangay|jobangay]] || [[word:shobangay|shobangay]] || [[word:kobangay|kobangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbangay|thĂŠbangay]] || [[word:jĂŠbangay|jĂŠbangay]] || [[word:shĂŠbangay|shĂŠbangay]] || [[word:kĂŠbangay|kĂŠbangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabangay|thathabangay]] || [[word:jajabangay|jajabangay]] || [[word:shashabangay|shashabangay]] || [[word:kakabangay|kakabangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabangay|thabangay]] || [[word:jabangay|jabangay]] || [[word:shabangay|shabangay]] || [[word:kabangay|kabangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabangay|thabangay]] || [[word:jabangay|jabangay]] || [[word:shabangay|shabangay]] || [[word:kabangay|kabangay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabangay|shabangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabangay|goshabangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabangay|gokishabangay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabangaynĂŒ|shabangaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabangaynknĂŒ|goshabangaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangaynĂŒ|gokishabangaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabangayshĂ«|shabangayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabangaynkshĂ«|goshabangaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabangayshĂ«|gokishabangayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangayro|shabangayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangaynkro|goshabangaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangayro|gokishabangayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangaymu|shabangaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangaynkmu|goshabangaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangaymu|gokishabangaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabangaysher|shabangaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabangaynksher|goshabangaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabangaysher|gokishabangaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabangayng|shabangayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabangaynkng|goshabangaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabangayng|gokishabangayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabangaya|shabangaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabangaynkya|goshabangaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabangaya|gokishabangaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabangayam|shabangayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabangaynkyam|goshabangaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabangayam|gokishabangayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangaynĂŒshĂ«|shabangaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshabangaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishabangaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangaynĂŒro|shabangaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangaynknĂŒro|goshabangaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangaynĂŒro|gokishabangaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangaynĂŒmu|shabangaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangaynknĂŒmu|goshabangaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangaynĂŒmu|gokishabangaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangayshĂ«nĂŒ|shabangayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabangaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabangayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangayshĂ«ro|shabangayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangaynkshĂ«ro|goshabangaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangayshĂ«ro|gokishabangayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangayshĂ«mu|shabangayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangaynkshĂ«mu|goshabangaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangayshĂ«mu|gokishabangayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangayronĂŒ|shabangayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangaynkronĂŒ|goshabangaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangayronĂŒ|gokishabangayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangayroshĂ«|shabangayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangaynkroshĂ«|goshabangaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangayroshĂ«|gokishabangayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangayromu|shabangayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangaynkromu|goshabangaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangayromu|gokishabangayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangaymunĂŒ|shabangaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangaynkmunĂŒ|goshabangaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangaymunĂŒ|gokishabangaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangaymushĂ«|shabangaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangaynkmushĂ«|goshabangaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangaymushĂ«|gokishabangaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangaymuro|shabangaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangaynkmuro|goshabangaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangaymuro|gokishabangaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
